living_legends.message.place_created.def: Stories are already gathering around this place. They call it: %s
living_legends.message.place_created.dea: Locals speak softly of what was lost here, and call it: %s
The ground remembers fallen steps. People now call it: %s
The depths have taken a story of their own: %s
living_legends.message.place_created.bat: After the fighting, locals began calling this place: %s
living_legends.message.place_created.sla: Whispers over the fields carry a new name: %s
living_legends.message.place_created.pvp: Rivals left a tale in the soil. The arena is called: %s
living_legends.message.place_created.min: Miners have begun passing down the name of this vein: %s
living_legends.message.place_created.por: Travelers between worlds have named this crossing: %s
living_legends.message.place_created.gen: Many footsteps left a name behind: %s
living_legends.message.place_created.fir: A first discovery has entered legend as: %s
living_legends.message.place_created.bos: A great fall has become a local legend. They call this place: %s

living_legends.message.place_created.rai: After the defense, people began calling this place: %s
living_legends.message.place_created.dim: A threshold between realms has taken a name: %s
living_legends.message.place_created.set: Where life took root, people began saying: %s
living_legends.message.place_created.cus: This place has taken a name: %s
living_legends.message.place_created.fir: The world's first stronghold has entered legend as: %s
